nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William De Bruce was born about 1130, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale, was 35 and his mother, Agnes Amund, was 34. He had at least 1 son with Judith de Lanchester. He died in 1183, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William De Bruce est né environ 1130, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Amund, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Judith de Lanchester. Il est décédé en 1183, à l’âge de 54 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William De Bruce è nato il circa 1130 nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Amund, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Judith de Lanchester. Morì nel 1183, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William De Bruceが約1130年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandaleは35歳，母Agnes Amundは34歳であった。彼はJudith de Lanchesterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1183年に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William De Bruce(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Amund(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Judith de Lanchester(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1183년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William De Bruce родился около 1130 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Amund, 34. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Judith de Lanchester. Он умер в 1183 г. в возрасте 54 лет.
